checkedClaims.claimText: The frontier is summarized with entropy over the retained domain distribution, `H(F) = - sum_d p(d) log p(d)`, where `p(d)` is the normalized retained-domain mass [SHANNON-1948].
checkedClaims.normalizedClaim: the frontier is summarized with entropy over the retained domain distribution h f - sum d p d log p d where p d is the normalized retained-domain mass shannon-1948
